hero.title: Cakes with presence.
hero.description: Sculptural celebration cakes, precise flavour and thoughtful detail—designed and baked in our Bristol studio.
hero.imageAlt: Elegant two-tier celebration cake with cupcakes on burgundy plinths

products.title: Choose your centrepiece
products.description: Start with a collection or commission something entirely your own.

items.description: Clean finish, layered flavour and a tailored colour story.
items.imageAlt: Modern tiered cake on a burgundy display

items.description: Architectural cakes for intimate dinners and full receptions.
items.imageAlt: Baker finishing a sculptural two-tier wedding cake

items.name: Cupcake edit
items.description: Twenty-four hand-finished cakes in two seasonal flavours.
items.imageAlt: Premium hand-finished cupcakes beside a tiered cake

feature.title: Designed first. Baked beautifully.
feature.description: Each commission begins with your occasion, room and mood. We then develop proportion, colour, texture and flavour as one complete piece.
feature.imageAlt: Professional cake designer finishing smooth buttercream in a bright studio

packages.title: A clear way to commission
packages.description: Transparent starting points, with final pricing shaped by size, finish and delivery.

items.name: Celebration
items.description: A polished single-tier cake for birthdays and gatherings.

items.name: Wedding atelier
items.description: A fully designed centrepiece with tasting and delivery.

items.name: Cupcake table
items.description: A display-ready collection for parties and brand events.

gallery.title: From sketchbook to cake table
gallery.description: A closer look at finished commissions, studio hands and thoughtful details.

story.title: Confident design, genuinely good cake.
story.description: Our small team combines pastry training with product and interior design. The result is cake that belongs in the room—and tastes as memorable as it looks.
story.imageAlt: Cake maker working carefully in the Northmill studio
story.quote: A cake should hold the room for a moment, then bring everyone to the table.

process.title: From idea to first slice
process.description: A considered process with clear decisions and no last-minute surprises.

steps.title: Tell us
steps.description: Share the date, guest count, venue and visual direction.

steps.title: Taste
steps.description: Choose favourites from a posted or studio tasting box.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Approve a clear sketch, palette and final quotation.

steps.title: Celebrate
steps.description: Collect from our studio or let us deliver and install.

testimonials.title: Celebrated by our clients
testimonials.description: Notes from couples, families and creative teams across the South West.

items.quote: It looked like a piece of design and tasted even better than our tasting box.
items.name: Imogen & Josh

items.quote: The process was calm, clear and completely professional from start to finish.
items.name: Leila M.

items.quote: Our launch cake was distinctive without feeling gimmicky. Exactly right.
items.name: Studio Alder

visit.title: Tell us what you're celebrating.
visit.description: Enquiries are answered within two working days. Local delivery and venue setup are quoted by postcode.

footer.note: Sculptural cakes, clear process, generous flavour.
